hero.headline: Cajun Cards & Collectibles
hero.copy: A subscription-first TCG club for online collectors who want Discord alerts, sealed drop access, digital claim windows, and a little lagniappe with every year.

announcements: Square checkout links can be updated any time in config/site.json.
No on-site payments are collected on this GitHub Pages build.
Subscriptions redirect to secure Square checkout.

discordDrop.title: Discord drop notifications
discordDrop.message: Join the Cajun Cards Discord for the next live drop alert.

subscriptions.name: Bayou Starter
subscriptions.summary: Entry access for online collectors who want Cajun Cards Discord alerts, digital drop visibility, and a cleaner path to sealed product opportunities.
subscriptions.bestFor: Online collectors who want reliable drop awareness and Discord access

subscriptions.name: Lagniappe Club
subscriptions.summary: Priority online membership with earlier Discord notifications, better sealed-product access windows, and stronger visibility into limited digital drops.
features: Early online access windows for sealed product
subscriptions.bestFor: Active online TCG collectors who want earlier access and better drop positioning

subscriptions.name: Fleur-de-Lis Elite
subscriptions.summary: The highest-access online tier for collectors who want first-look sealed opportunities, elite Discord alerts, and premium digital sourcing priority.
features: First-look Discord alerts before other tiers
Top priority for limited sealed product opportunities
Premium access to rare sealed availability updates
subscriptions.bestFor: Serious online collectors who want the highest level of access and exclusivity
